CustomField.description: Employment status of this person for this company: checked = currently an active employee. Editable replacement for the standard "Active" (IsActive) column on Related Contacts. Backfilled from IsActive on 2026-07-22. Uncheck when the employee leaves. (고용 상태 - 체크=현직 직원. 표준 Active(IsActive) 대체.)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check if this person is a current/active employee of this company; uncheck when they leave. (현직 직원이면 체크, 퇴사 시 해제.)
CustomField.label: Emp.Status
